he9f2256dg946cg472egbb7eg19bd50e8559b: Would you like to work for me?
hc6a695a3g1818g4813gb352g5847ef2ef9c7: Mm, mm, mm. Fortune favours my belly, for there is no meat more succulent than a stranger's.
h22fbeb91g266bg47d9gb10agad8bdbe6b23e: Stranger: be you friend or food? The mark is Her measure: show us the brand of the Absolute.
h13e6c28dgd3dag41eag892cg539bdfac69c4: You speak with an eloquence unusual for your kind.
h72711f0eg1cafg4dc0g94f1ga22605bdde04: You're quite eloquent for an ogre.
haec9016dg5e2eg499cg88dfg8067f198983e: I see it. How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
hded1033dgee67g448bgb1d0g85af71258efe: How regrettable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
hc3c46a55g0ee6g4fb3ga37ag06a5bd6e0c5e: Unh. You wound me, creature. I can hardly resist you.
h59a1dfffg34cbg49a8ga251g6701ab375c9d: Now speak or go, before my cravings conquer me.
h8e2ba48ag7c3bg4a0fg848dg11b5e6b61461: I notice you don't bear a brand of your own.
h7f8828a1gec85g4006gad45g9e785916b55c: I've no use for the Absolute - or any god. I follow two masters only: gluttony and greed.
h9be6a78bg9276g4ac3g8b90g9d3f8dfa1986: The goblins understand my appetites. They sate my hunger for gold...
h2f13eb9eg86eag4e3fga24ega623cedb1172: ...and the rest sate my hunger for meat.
h24c4cde3ga977g44a5gb256gf0c4c647cd0c: I simply look for marks. Gold is more than sufficient compensation.
h0308be69g3556g4634gb4f6ge0078fa71b3b: Forget the goblins - why not work for me instead?
h97fbc729gf1a9g495cg8a26g49f0e580ead1: I am by all accounts a student of higher commerce and extortion.
hf4755c6eg1781g46d1gb181gd26e6ca20e0a: I'll give you [6057ad05-9492-4630-9f0a-be548b134c54] gold if I can call you into battle.
h4d1aa64ag4d33g4ce5g8532gc124d27cfe98: A serenade to my ears, and a boon to my belly. We've a bargain, my tasty kibble!
h739756abgc5deg4023g866ag26e119415bee: Take my bonehorn. One blow, and the ground will quake with my family name.
ha3372799gca8bg4f52g86c6g57ae5ff41f30: Use it when the need arises - and never a moment before.
h7a0c1e41ge182g45d4ga908g6e9e07ce976a: You're rather well-spoken for one of your kind.
hb905c516ga368g459bga121gaf06ce839cdc: Am I not astonishing? A robust diet makes for a shrewd mind, you see. I am a gourmand...
he89a590dg31c2g4e1fg862fga0bfaeab1c4a: ...and you, a delicacy - were I so lucky.
he67d1962g7e57g4c0fgaaeeg1ea303866c3c: ...and you, a delicacy - unless you bear the mark, of course.
h1fac5404gf594g48a2gad21g57513bf13d08: I know of your kind, but you're among the first I've seen.
h3f53804dg9fd0g470eg96ceg45781b94b433: I've seen few other ogres in these parts.
hd98a5680ge0cfg46d7g9d6eg610ca5455475: Mm - your candor makes you all the more enticing.
h927e9ae6g3652g482bgb9cfg02d27cb2c7f3: I follow the scents of blood and gold to all lands fertile, friend.
hfecd2d10g6096g45c8g8b6fg54187cd4df93: And this land proves particularly... fruitful.
h40258987gd3b5g401cg8691gbd63c7877216: I will keep close. When you are ready, sound the horn.
h83739023gc618g450dga553g53757d6a89db: Take my bonehorn. One blow, and... just a moment. It's been thieved - and I know the culprit.
haf2b4964g17a4g4765gb112ga995ebfe4130: I'll give you [463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca] gold - after you fight for me.
h72d88b64g17a2g4bdbg8be0g27cc89a90bcc: A twice-played serenade to my ears, my tasty kibble. We have a bargain!
hd8c96c7fgdb4eg4e7fga5b6g46d8f0cf0772: I'll give you [463b0f43-5410-412d-aba3-875cf81c38ca] gold - after you fight for me.
ha2a4b569g753bg4c6fga2a5g159613cc2324: Come, now. An ogre feasts not on promises.
h791893c3g68d5g4388gb855gf0c79586ba96: I'll pay you in the flesh of the fallen - you'll have your fill.
h1dc13127gd15cg4003g8e83g9eeb45d13101: A brilliant notion, and a boon to my aching belly. We have a deal, my tasty kibble!
hbf7468aag6115g4335ga378gb5b52cfd3953: A slip of the tongue - you meant to make a better offer, surely.
h5a5d6814g1afeg4e97g8149g51a34c0e3f5a: I'll pay you in the flesh of the fallen - you'll have your fill.
h93851d09g2818g4406ga013g8463d00b1af3: I've changed my mind. Forget about it.
h94f05226g6985g4809g9015gd24be58d50a6: Oh, but you do love to tease.
h9b74bfbcgada8g4f51g8b5cgf3e64ba654a8: Alas - not so much as a nibble.
hac81dff3g7549g4b3dg8618gaa1c176ac490: I'll leave that to your imagination.
h09e6f6ddg6001g4d20ga341g28c1f894d1b5: I'll do you one better - I'm one of her chosen disciples.
h23c58bc6g490eg431aga04eg444310b2d1a7: Indeed? How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h605db9b9g5ea7g4afcgadb4g01e8f51bacfb: How regrettable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
hf41c9c6agc63cg49bbg84f7g6901d675a2ba: I expect more than your word. Show me your flesh.
h1a3eed0fg0e7cg4a14ga8f3gcc92db8eef19: Flash your arm at him. There you are. You could see the brand, could you not?
h6fabffd3ge45eg42c2ga705g01c9eba29df6: Yes, yes - the mark is unmistakable. How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h98addc02ge800g43efg8e35g5c5ccd2c7179: Yes, yes - the mark is unmistakable. Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
h15834f2fg46d9g462fga698g3b43746b0fa1: Ha! Did you expect The Enlightened to fall for such a crude ruse?
hea9637f5g6d6bg4923g87f8g5f1f6edd42f9: Do not test the Absolute's finest, ogre. You would not survive Her wrath.
h15f98ef6gda0eg4159ga795g771b1a0e0e83: Spoken with the confidence only a True Soul could muster!
h1fd1d016g4391g4823g82a1g466dcb16b906: How regrettable, that your meat must go unsavoured.
h42c3cd29g9a80g471egb7ceg796df44de889: Tell me, sweet creature: does your flesh taste as honeyed as I could hope for?
